subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face to the Most Glorious Kingdom! Blessed art thou, for thou hast drunk the cup of everlasting life from the hand of the cup-bearer of faithfulness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من توجه الی الملکوت الابهی هنیئا لک بما شربت کاس البقاء من ساقی الوفاء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual transformation
